title: Master_Recycling_Guide_Part_2_Paper_And_Cardboard
text:
# Common Mistakes

Avoid placing these in paper recycling:

-   Wet cardboard
-   Food-soiled paper
-   Plastic wrapping
-   Bubble mailers
-   Padded envelopes
-   Wax-coated cartons
-   Plastic shipping envelopes

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Preparation Checklist

Before recycling paper or cardboard:

-   Remove food.
-   Keep materials dry.
-   Flatten boxes.
-   Remove plastic packing.
-   Do not bag paper recyclables unless instructed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Synonyms

Users may search for:

-   Cardboard box
-   Shipping box
-   Amazon box
-   Moving box
-   Corrugated box
-   Carton
-   Paperboard
-   Cereal box
-   Office paper
-   Printer paper
-   Junk mail
-   Mailer
-   Magazine
-   Newspaper

------------------------------------------------------------------------

-   U.S. EPA Recycling: https://www.epa.gov/recycle
